baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, legacy multi-call git metadata collection
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs using separate git calls for branch, status, recent commits, and ahead/behind counts

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, consolidated git metadata collection
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs using one git status --porcelain=1 --branch call plus one git log call

environment.note: A follow-up phase benchmark showed repo-snapshot cost dropping materially inside buildContextPack after this consolidation.
